name: aerograph
description: Open-source flight recorder for AI agent workflows.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aerograph/contracts -w @aerograph/sdk -w @aerograph/adapter-langchain -w apps-collector -w apps-demo -w apps-web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @aerograph/contracts -w @aerograph/sdk -w @aerograph/adapter-langchain && npm run --workspaces test
